title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 03 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 03 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 03 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep downward all the day.The main contract closed at 786.5,decreased of 0.82%. Traders are generallymotivated to ship, Speculative demand increases. Steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 780-795 yuan/mt;,decrease15 yuan/mt than yesterday;SSF at Shandong port dealt 660 yuan/mt;PBF at Tangshan dealt 777 -790 yuan/mt,decrease 10-23yuan/mt than yesterday.
